Whenever ~ enters the battlefield or attacks, scry 1, then you may tap target creature.", "flavor_text": ""Truth rises to the surface when viewed from above."", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "WU archetype signpost combining white's tapping effects with blue's flying and scry. The enter/attack trigger provides board control while enabling tempo plays. Stats are appropriate for uncommon multicolor."}, {"name": "Bloodpact Anarchist", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Warlock", "oracle_text": "Haste
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card and you draw a card.
{1}{B}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "BR build-around combining red's aggressive haste creatures with black's discard effects. The activated ability pushes damage through for the trigger. Power level appropriate for rare with multiple abilities."}, {"name": "Worn Pickaxe", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact — Equipment", "oracle_text": "Equipped creature gets +2/+1.
Equip {1}", "flavor_text": ""Every strike brings us closer to the treasure below."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple equipment at common with straightforward power boost. Cost and equip cost are balanced for limited play. Single ability keeps complexity low."}, {"name": "Crucible of Echoes", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{3}, {T}: Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.
{7}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for up to three cards with different names, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with three activated abilities of increasing cost and power. Mana production enables the expensive abilities. Copy effect tests spell-copying templating. Ultimate ability provides powerful card selection."}, {"name": "Kethara, Divine Judge", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Kethara", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-2: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
-7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, you may return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "WB planeswalker combining white's lifegain with black's life drain. Removal ability gives compensation (white philosophy). Ultimate creates powerful recursion engine. Starting loyalty and costs balanced for mythic power level."}]}
